title: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework
preview: Today we're releasing Foundation Models framework support for Claude through a new Swift package that lets Apple developers use Apple's Foundation Models framework to call Claude for more complex workflows.

blocks.english: Today we're releasing Foundation Models framework support for Claude through a new Swift package that lets Apple developers use Apple's Foundation Models framework to call Claude for more complex workflows.
blocks.chinese: 今天我们通过一个新的 Swift 包发布了对 Claude 的 Foundation Models 框架支持，让 Apple 开发者可以使用 Apple 的 Foundation Models 框架来调用 Claude，以处理更复杂的工作流。

blocks.english: Apple's Foundation Models framework gives developers access to tap into models natively from Swift. It is very easy to use and can return typed Swift values through guided generation in as few as three lines of code. Developers can use this to tap into Apple's on-device models for fast, local tasks like summarization or extraction.
blocks.chinese: Apple 的 Foundation Models 框架让开发者能够从 Swift 原生调用模型。它非常易于使用，通过引导生成（guided generation），仅需三行代码即可返回类型化的 Swift 值。开发者可以利用它调用 Apple 的设备端模型来完成快速的本地任务，如摘要生成或信息提取。

blocks.alt: Apple Foundation Models 集成示意图 1

blocks.english: Developers can now use Apple's Foundation Models framework to hand off to Claude when a request calls for multi-step reasoning, code generation, and more. Claude can also search the web for current information and execute code for data analysis. Stream Claude's response back into the same view.
blocks.chinese: 开发者现在可以在请求需要多步推理、代码生成等复杂操作时，通过 Apple 的 Foundation Models 框架将任务交给 Claude。Claude 还可以搜索网络获取最新信息，以及执行代码进行数据分析。Claude 的响应会以流式方式传回同一视图中。

blocks.alt: Apple Foundation Models 集成示意图 2

blocks.english: Because Apple's framework returns typed Swift values from @Generable annotations, developers arrive at the Claude API call with clean inputs instead of raw user text.
blocks.chinese: 由于 Apple 的框架通过 @Generable 注解返回类型化的 Swift 值，开发者在调用 Claude API 时获得的是结构化的输入，而非原始的用户文本。

blocks.english: The Foundation Models framework already powers a range of intelligent on-device features — journaling apps that surface personalized prompts, document apps that summarize contracts, learning apps that explain a concept at a student's level. Adding Claude extends each of those patterns.
blocks.chinese: Foundation Models 框架已经为一系列智能设备端功能提供支持——包括能生成个性化提示的日记应用、能摘要合同的文档应用，以及能以学生水平解释概念的学习应用。加入 Claude 后，这些模式都得到了进一步扩展。

blocks.english: A journaling app can generate daily prompts on-device, then ask Claude to find threads across months of entries. A study app can define a term on-device, then hand off to Claude when the student follows up with "why does this matter for everything else we've covered?"
blocks.chinese: 日记应用可以在设备端生成每日提示，然后让 Claude 在数月的记录中寻找关联线索。学习应用可以在设备端解释一个术语的定义，然后当学生追问"这和我们学过的其他内容有什么关系？"时，将任务交给 Claude。

blocks.english: It's one experience for the user, backed by the right model for each step.
blocks.chinese: 对用户而言这是一体化的体验，每一步背后都有最合适的模型在提供支持。

blocks.english: Claude support with the Foundation Models framework will be available tomorrow and works through Apple's Foundation Models framework on iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, and visionOS 27, and watchOS 27. Add it to your project, sign in with an Anthropic API key, and pass typed outputs from Apple's on-device pass into a Claude request — the package handles streaming, tool calls, and structured responses back into your SwiftUI view.
blocks.chinese: 对 Claude 的 Foundation Models 框架支持将于明天上线，支持 iOS 27、iPadOS 27、macOS 27、visionOS 27 和 watchOS 27 平台上的 Apple Foundation Models 框架。将其添加到你的项目中，使用 Anthropic API 密钥登录，然后将 Apple 设备端模型的类型化输出传入 Claude 请求——该包会处理流式传输、工具调用以及结构化响应，并将其回传到你的 SwiftUI 视图中。
